headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: Your desktop, now alive and moving.
subtitle: Wallnetic transforms your Mac with stunning live video wallpapers that play effortlessly across multiple monitors. Dynamic, beautiful, and surprisingly kind to your CPU.

headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Build AI prompts like a pro engineer.
subtitle: Avalon is a privacy-first visual IDE for crafting image generation workflows — structure prompts as a JSON tree, get AI rewrites on any single field, and keep every experiment local.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Your entire financial life, one clean page.
subtitle: My Net Worth unifies Fidelity, Vanguard, IBKR, crypto wallets, and bank accounts without connecting to a single service. Intentionally offline, intentionally simple.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Stop secrets from leaking before they start.
subtitle: Env Protector intercepts .env files before VS Code ever renders them, offering masked views and a zero-exposure workflow. Security baked in from the very first keystroke.
